content.full_text:
October 24, 2000

Daniel Kramer
9250 Delair Way
Elk Grove, CA 95758

Re: Your Correspondence Dated September 16, 2000
Our File No. G-00-215

Dear Mr. Kramer:

This letter is in response to your letter dated September 16, 2000 to the Fair Political Practices Commission.

Because your letter appears to be a complaint regarding a campaign mailing, I have forwarded your request to the Enforcement Division. You should receive a response from the Enforcement Division under separate cover. For your information, I have enclosed a pamphlet entitled "Filing A Complaint."

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant General Counsel

By: Kelly L. Winsor
Legal Analyst

LM:KLW:jg

Enclosure
